basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Assistant, Project Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Center (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: The National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has officially announced the Project Assistant-II and Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification has been released under Advertisement No. RECRUIT_RC_5C_Chennai_14072026_B / RECRUIT_RC_5C_Chennai_14072026. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 35 years and hold qualifications including B.Sc. in Chemistry or B.E./B.Tech. in Civil/Chemical Engineering can attend the walk-in interview on 24 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and complete recruitment details are s

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.details: Project Assistant-II: B.Sc. in Chemistry as one of the subject from a recognized University/Institute. Project Associate-I: B. E./B. Tech. (Civil/ Chemical Eng.) from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant-II: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Project Associate-I: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR NEERI Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NEERI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR NEERI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant-II: B.Sc. in Chemistry as one of the subject from a recognized University/Institute. Project Associate-I: B. E./B. Tech. (Civil/ Chemical Eng.) from a recognized university.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Assistant-II: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Project Associate-I: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 24 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for Project Assistant-II at CSIR NEERI?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant-II position, candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Chemistry as one of the subjects from a recognized University or Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Associate-I position is a B.E. or B.Tech. degree in Civil or Chemical Engineering from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts announced by CSIR NEERI?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by CSIR NEERI is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant-II position will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate-I role, the salary offered is either Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA or Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA, depending on the specific requirements and candidate's profile.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available in this CSIR NEERI recruitment?
faq.answer: CSIR NEERI has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the positions of Project Assistant-II and Project Associate-I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for this recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions at CSIR NEERI will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the CSIR NEERI office located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600113. Candidates should report to the venue as per the specified time.
